ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Stauts On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-05-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sherman Hoo (Executor) in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that the verifications signed by the Co-Executors were not dated. Mr. Hoo orally verified in open Court that the contents provided in the supplement filed on May 9, 2017 are true and correct under penalty of perjury. Mr. Hoo provided a courtesy copy of the supplement and a proposed order. The Court granted the Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Accounting (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-11-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Petitioner in Pro Per Sherman Hoo is present.

The Court informed Sherman that being represented by counsel is beneficial to administering an estate, that the required Duties and Liabilities form has not been filed and confirmed that there is only one real property in the estate. Sherman stated that he is receiving help from an attorney friend who practices in Los Angeles and confirms that it is only 1 piece of property.

The Court takes the Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary is taken under submission and will become granted once the duties and liabilities have been filed. If the filing has not occurred within one week, the petition will go back on calendar and Sherman will need to appear in court represented by an attorney.

The Court further ordered:

1. A status date of July 06, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 is set for filing inventory and appraisal.

2. A status date of September 05, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 is det for status on close of estate.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Nancy Wong. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
